# Test Fixtures — Disc Images

Minimal synthetic disc images for testing dimg-tool/dolphin-tool integration.
All created deterministically, no copyrighted content.

## Files

| File | Format | System | Sectors | Size | Created from |
|------|--------|--------|---------|------|-------------|
| test_ps1.cue | CUE sheet | PS1 | - | 71B | authored |
| test_ps1.bin | MODE2/2352 | PS1 | 200 | 460KB | authored |
| test_ps1.aaru | Aaru (zstd) | PS1 | 200 | 4.7KB | dimg-tool convert |
| test_ps1_multitrack.cue | CUE sheet | PS1 | - | 121B | authored (2 tracks) |
| test_ps1_multitrack.bin | MODE2/2352+AUDIO | PS1 | 350 | 803KB | authored |
| test_ps1_multitrack.aaru | Aaru (zstd) | PS1 | 350 | ~5KB | dimg-tool convert |
| test_ps2dvd.iso | ISO9660 | PS2 DVD | 175 | 350KB | genisoimage |
| test_ps2dvd.aaru | Aaru (zstd) | PS2 DVD | 175 | 1.6KB | dimg-tool convert |
| test_gc.iso | GC disc | GameCube | - | 2.0MB | authored (Python) |
| test_gc.rvz | RVZ (zstd-5) | GameCube | - | 33KB | dolphin-tool convert |

## Roundtrip verification

All converted files roundtrip bit-perfectly back to their source format:
- `test_ps1.aaru` → CUE/BIN → identical to `test_ps1.cue`/`test_ps1.bin`
- `test_ps1_multitrack.aaru` → CUE/BIN → identical (2 tracks: MODE2 data + AUDIO)
- `test_ps2dvd.aaru` → ISO → identical to `test_ps2dvd.iso`
- `test_gc.rvz` → ISO → identical to `test_gc.iso`

## Regeneration

```bash
# PS1 (MODE2/2352 CUE/BIN)
# See test_ps1.bin generation script in commit history
dimg-tool convert -i test_ps1.cue -o test_ps1.aaru -s ps1 -c zstd

# PS1 multi-track (MODE2 data + AUDIO, 200+150 sectors)
# BIN generated by Python script, CUE references matching filename
dimg-tool convert -i test_ps1_multitrack.cue -o test_ps1_multitrack.aaru -s ps1 -c zstd

# PS2 DVD (ISO9660)
mkdir -p /tmp/iso && echo "ROMTHOLOS_TEST_FIXTURE" > /tmp/iso/SYSTEM.CNF
genisoimage -quiet -V "TEST_DISC" -o test_ps2dvd.iso /tmp/iso/
dimg-tool convert -i test_ps2dvd.iso -o test_ps2dvd.aaru -s ps2dvd -c zstd

# GameCube (minimal GC disc header)
# See test_gc.iso generation script in commit history
dolphin-tool convert -i test_gc.iso -o test_gc.rvz -f rvz -c zstd -l 5 -b 131072
```
